nasb.text: But the news about Him was spreading even farther, and large crowds were gathering to hear Him and to be healed of their sicknesses.

esv.text: But now even more the report about him went abroad, and great crowds gathered to hear him and to be healed of their infirmities.

cnv.text: 但他的名聲卻越發傳揚出去，成群的人來聚集，要聽道，並且要使他們的疾病痊愈。

ccb.text: 结果耶稣的名声传得更广了，成群的人聚集到祂那里听祂讲道、求祂医病。

csbs.text: 耶稣的消息反而越发传开了。有一大群人聚集而来，听他传道，也要他们的病得痊愈。
